test_cases.description: Verifies the skill runs all critical validation checks when analyzing an existing sitemap
test_cases.input: Here is my sitemap. Can you validate it? It has 60,000 URLs and all lastmod dates are 2024-01-01.

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill distinguishes safe vs risky programmatic page patterns
test_cases.input: I want to generate a sitemap for 200 location pages, one per city with just the city name swapped in.

test_cases.description: Verifies valid XML sitemap format is generated on request
test_cases.input: Generate a valid XML sitemap for a small blog with 5 pages: home, about, blog index, and 2 blog posts.
